SALLY Quality Gate

Generated: 2026-03-29T06:21:36.184Z
Target: https://sally-api-staging.appshore.in/api/v1 · Tenant: Northstar Logistics (demo-northstar-2026) · Commit: local
1390
Total
1389
Passed
0
Failed
1
Skipped

What Each Suite Tests

Suite What it proves Example check
Smoke System is alive, users can authenticate Health returns 200, DISPATCHER token works, critical GETs don't 500
RBAC Only correct roles can access each endpoint DRIVER can't create loads (403), DISPATCHER can list loads (200), anonymous gets 401
Workflows Domain features work end-to-end per business area Fleet: drivers, vehicles, loads, customers, recurring lanes
Financials: invoices, settlements, billing, close-out, profitability
Operations: alerts, shield, command center, notifications, routes, IFTA
Platform: users, invitations, feature flags, plans, add-ons, webhooks
Super Admin: tenants, billing admin, broadcasts, feedback admin
Contracts API response shapes haven't changed — fields exist, types match Driver response has driverId (string), name (string). If removed or renamed, test fails. New fields are fine.
Browser Real user can login and navigate the UI Login page works, dashboard renders, no JS errors, pages load without 500s
